lighting.shadow_character: Deep and dark shadows towards the front-right with soft edges

color.grading_style: Rich contrast, lifted blacks, cinematic film look

composition.focus_point: Sharp focus on the egg yolk and the meat in front of it
composition.composition_rule: Rule of thirds (yolk on intersection) + leading lines (cutlery)

improvement_notes: Lighting: The right shadow is too deep, obscuring the bowl's shape. Add an edge light with a small reflector. Color: The rice in the bottom-left has a dull gray tint. Locally adjust exposure/white balance. Composition: The cutlery is distractingly close to the edge of the frame. Move it 2-3cm in or remove it.
nano_banana_prompt: Commercial food photography, extreme close-up shot, appetizing grilled pork ribs over rice, topped with a glossy raw egg yolk, garnished with sliced red onions and scallions, sprinkled with sesame seeds, placed in a dark ceramic bowl, rustic weathered dark wood table background, out of focus brass cutlery in foreground. Directional back-left softbox lighting, specular highlights on shiny ingredients, dark and moody lighting, deep rich shadows, warm color temperature, golden hour tones, rich contrast, shot on 100mm macro lens, f/2.8, extremely shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the egg yolk and center meat, Kodak Portra 800 film style, cinematic, editorial food magazine style, 8k resolution, highly detailed texture.
